scripts.human:build:
pnpm --filter @vibe-flags/core build && echo '
✅ Build complete. Run: pnpm human:publish'
scripts.human:publish: pnpm human:build && pnpm --filter @vibe-flags/core exec npm publish --access public
scripts.agent:publish-pre: BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD) && pnpm --filter @vibe-flags/core exec npm version prerelease --preid=$BRANCH && pnpm --filter @vibe-flags/core build && pnpm --filter @vibe-flags/core exec npm publish --access public --tag $BRANCH
scripts.agent:publish-patch: pnpm --filter @vibe-flags/core exec npm version patch && pnpm --filter @vibe-flags/core build && pnpm --filter @vibe-flags/core exec npm publish --access public
scripts.agent:publish-minor: pnpm --filter @vibe-flags/core exec npm version minor && pnpm --filter @vibe-flags/core build && pnpm --filter @vibe-flags/core exec npm publish --access public
